prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: SOLUTION STRUCTURE OF THE C-TERMINAL NEGATIVE REGULATORY DOMAIN OF P53 IN A COMPLEX WITH CA2+-BOUND S100B(BB). Entity description: S100 CALCIUM-BINDING PROTEIN. Organism: Rattus norvegicus. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required, hard_topology_word_withheld:coiled_coil_register. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: cofactor_context generic_complex_only ligand_context metal_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: public component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['CA']
generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence
hard topology hint coiled_coil_register is recorded for postseal mining, not handed to E65 as a solved word

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
